textContent:
I really need to get this off my mind since I don't wanna feel like this anymore. I don't wanna add to your issues ngayon, so if you're not okay don't read this.




I really like you adam, I wanna be with you. I think you're really cute and Im just comfortable around you now. I like na sobrang gago mo pag jokes lang pero you're a softie on the inside lang pala. You're very sweet and understanding, and putangina I just like that in you.

I don't know why I'm saying this to you rn kasi we're really close now, and I don't wanna lose all of that. Pwede ka pa ring mag-rant sakin ng kung ano-ano, and I'll just listen to all of your woes. 

I-reject mo man ako or not, I hope that nothing happens between us. I don't want you to be weird or anything, I just really want to tell you this kasi I don't wanna wake up everyday with a heavy heart and overthink about things. And I know na you really like Nicole, and support lang ako sayo, with whatever makes you happy. :>

Yun lang.

Love, Ian.
